expectations.text: Uses soft (preferred) podAffinity, explains hard-variant first-deploy deadlock
expectations.evidence: 'use preferred... hard self-referential affinity deadlocks the first deploy'

expectations.text: Specifies topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
expectations.evidence: topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname

expectations.text: Sets accessModes: ReadWriteOnce (Hetzner has no RWX)
expectations.evidence: 'RWO because Hetzner Cloud Volumes do not support RWX'

expectations.text: Mentions Longhorn as RWX alternative that drops podAffinity
expectations.evidence: 'switch the StorageClass to Longhorn, which supports RWX... drop the podAffinity'

expectations.evidence: 'Do not set accessModes: ReadWriteMany... Hetzner rejects it'

expectations.text: Uses soft (preferred) podAffinity, explains hard-variant first-deploy deadlock

notes: NON-DISCRIMINATING on all 3 evals (15/15 both configs). Baseline matched every discriminating detail (soft-vs-hard podAffinity deadlock, Hetzner RWO/Longhorn RWX, volumeClaimTemplates naming, delete-by-name + label-delete warning, Secret volume mount + rotation strategies). Strong base-model K8s storage knowledge.
